mechanism_narrative: Sustained low federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or mean 20-day returns are negative.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering negative equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand, driving positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance or forward returns are negative when both series rise.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization, supporting positive monthly equity returns during recovery phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during recovery regimes or Rank IC drops below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates robust labor demand and wage growth, generating positive forward equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Mean 20-day returns are negative or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.5% triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations within one week.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 60% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly retail sales signals underlying demand resilience, producing positive monthly equity returns when both expand.
failure_condition: Joint expansion of GDP and retail sales yields negative forward returns or interaction coefficient is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during late-cycle expansions signals supply bottlenecks and margin compression, generating negative quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive quarterly returns occur in more than 50% of declining industrial production instances during late-cycle regimes.
